name_cn:
🎉New Oil Wax Leather Tote Bag🎉🎉🎉
This tote bag is made of imported oil wax leather, with a glossy sheen that exudes a classical vibe. It can be worn on the shoulder or carried by hand, and has a very large capacity. It is incredibly practical 👏. It is an absolute must-have for fashionistas. Bring this vintage check tote home now!
Size: 1BG460
Size: 39X31X 10cm
